entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The plant species O.sativa used in the study to analyze miRNA expression

entities.name: MICRORNAS
entities.description: Small non-coding RNAs that regulate genes involved in plant growth, development, and abiotic stress responses

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE STRESS
entities.description: An abiotic stress environment used to analyze the expression of novel miRNAs in rice

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: General environmental stresses to which plants respond via miRNA regulation

entities.name: HOMOLOGY SEARCH
entities.description: A computational method used to predict novel miRNAs in rice

entities.name: REAL TIME PCR
entities.description: A laboratory technique used to analyze the expression of 14 novel miRNAs in rice seedlings

entities.name: MIR157A
entities.description: A novel miRNA found to be expressed in all five rice cultivars studied

entities.name: MIR165A
entities.description: A novel miRNA showing differential expression between heat tolerant and susceptible rice cultivars

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of specific rice cultivars to withstand high temperature stress

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Biological processes regulated by microRNAs in plants
